notes: OWN gnarly Suilend supply+claim case (72 raw events): borrow_request 1789 USDC (BorrowEvent idx 6, origination fee 0) + 15x claim_rewards_and_deposit across the owner's obligations. Each NONZERO ClaimRewardEvent = lend_reward:claim (income at receipt) immediately re-supplied = lend_supply:deposit flagged auto_compounded (sentAmount = underlying liquidity_amount from the paired MintEvent, NOT the ctoken_amount — sSUI rate is 1.0 so they coincide, but DEEP 77345974 underlying -> 72600183 ctokens and WAL 1689 -> 1594 differ). Zero-amount ClaimRewardEvents (idx 22, 36, 37, 57, 64, 65) emit nothing. Reward coins: sSUI (SpringSui 83556891…::spring_sui::SPRING_SUI, 9 dec), DEEP (6 dec), WAL (9 dec). InterestUpdate/ReserveAssetData/ObligationData events are bookkeeping noise (no TaxEvent).
